overview: Great Lakes Integrative Medicine combines conventional and holistic approaches to treat hormonal imbalances, age-related conditions, and overall wellness. The practice specializes in bioidentical hormone replacement therapy and peptide therapy delivered through multiple formats.
highlights: BHRT via pellets, injectables, creams, and oral agents
Physician-guided peptide therapy for hormone optimization
Management of menopausal, perimenopausal, and andropausal symptoms
targetAudience: Men and women experiencing hormonal imbalances and age-related health changes who seek integrative wellness approaches.
